justification: All pass criteria met: (1) Brief systematically distinguishes high-confidence and low-confidence sections via per-section confidence ratings and a confidence_summary table. (2) High-confidence sections correctly cover API endpoint (GET /reports), format (csv|pdf), and date range parameters. (3) Low-confidence/NONE sections explicitly flag report content and metrics as undefined — 'usage' is called out as the single highest-risk assumption. (4) Partial escalation to Bird for missing acceptance criteria — blocking questions are scoped to aggregation logic, not the entire feature. (5) Shaq can begin API scaffolding — the brief explicitly states 'Everything else (endpoint shape, formats, date filtering) is buildable.' (6) No invented report content — Magic never fabricates metrics or fills Bird's gap with guesses. (7) Pippen's async generation recommendation is included as an explicit architectural note with concrete mitigation steps (structure handler for async swap, enforce date range cap).

observations.text: Confidence calibration is exceptionally granular — applied per-section with a summary table (LOW/HIGH/NONE/HIGH/MEDIUM), not just a single overall rating
The 'usage' term is correctly identified as the highest-risk undefined concept and treated as blocking only for aggregation logic, not the entire feature
Acceptance criteria are explicitly marked 'validated_by_bird: NO' on every criterion — making the surrogate nature unmistakable
Contradictions between Bird's silence and MJ's decisions are surfaced and resolved with clear defaults and escalation paths
Recommended sequencing (CSV-first, defer PDF) reduces blast radius of unvalidated format assumption
Open questions are split into blocking vs non-blocking, giving Shaq a clear sense of what can proceed and what cannot
Pippen's async generation note is not just mentioned but integrated into architecture guidance with a concrete strategy (sync now, structured for async swap)
Bird's vague language ('visibility into their usage') is never forwarded unchanged — it is explicitly deconstructed and flagged as unresolved
